statement: In every magma, Equation 1614 (`x = (y * z) * (w * (z * y))`) implies Equation 2995 (`x = ((y * (z * y)) * y) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0951
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op w (op z y)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op z y)) y) y)
